channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: politics
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: politics

item.title: Trump offers prayers for people in hurricane's path after lashing out at Harris and other women
item.description: SCRANTON, Pa. (AP) — Former President Donald Trump offered his prayers to those in the path of Hurricane Milton as it began to lash Florida while continuing to insult his rival, Vice President Kamala Harris, and other women — saying he had no interest in stopping even if it turned off female voters.
item.dc:creator: MICHELLE L. PRICE, JILL COLVIN and WILL WEISSERT, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: A federal judge will hear more evidence on whether to reopen voter registration in Georgia
item.description: ATLANTA (AP) — At least for now, a federal judge won’t order the state of Georgia to reopen voter registration for November’s elections. U.S.
item.dc:creator: JEFF AMY, Associated Press, NewsNation

item.title: Biden condemns ‘un-American’ 'lies' about federal storm response as Hurricane Milton nears Florida
item.description: President Joe Biden blasted his predecessor for spreading an “onslaught of lies” about how the federal government is handling the damage from Hurricane Helene as another hurricane, Milton, was on the verge of making landfall in Florida.
item.dc:creator: Will Weissert And Josh Boak, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: This is FEMA's role in preparing for Hurricane Milton
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — Hurricane Milton is set to slam Florida on Wednesday evening — the second hurricane to strike in two weeks — and the federal agency tasked with responding to disasters is once again positioning supplies and personnel where they're needed and coordinating with state and local offici
item.dc:creator: REBECCA SANTANA, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Pat Ryan, Alison Esposito face off in NY-18 debate on PIX11
item.description: NEW YORK (PIX11) – Democratic U.S. Rep. Pat Ryan and Republican Alison Esposito, the two candidates running to represent New York's 18th Congressional District, faced off in a debate on PIX11 Wednesday night.
item.dc:creator: Finn Hoogensen, PIX 11

item.title: House Democrats' campaign chief defends vulnerable members keeping distance from Harris
item.description: NEW YORK — Rep. Suzan DelBene (D-Wash.), the House Democrats’ campaign chief, is defending vulnerable lawmakers who have kept their distance from Vice President Harris while campaigning.
item.dc:creator: Mychael Schnell, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Same poll taken one month apart shows which presidential candidate has momentum in key states
item.description: With less than four weeks until Election Day, new polls in three crucial battleground states indicate a coin-toss race between Vice President Kamala Harris and former President Trump.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Vance’s Midwestern roots appeal to Michigan swing-county voters despite Buckeye ties
item.description: Ohio Sen. JD Vance can help former President Donald Trump win Michigan thanks to his Midwestern upbringing, which will appeal to voters in the critical swing state.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Kremlin confirms Trump sent COVID tests to Putin during pandemic
item.description: “We also sent equipment at the beginning of the pandemic,” Kremlin spokesman Dmitry Peskov said. “But about the phone calls — it’s not true.
item.dc:creator: Laura Kelly, NewsNation

item.title: Trump Florida resort hosts linemen before Hurricane Milton response
item.description: The Trump Organization extended an invitation to more than 200 power linemen to stay at their golf resort in Miami Wednesday, as Florida's Gulf Coast prepares for Hurricane Milton to make landfall this week.
item.dc:creator: Ashleigh Fields, NewsNation

item.title: Human Rights Campaign launching ad blitz for Harris, other Democrats
item.description: Human Rights Campaign (HRC) and its Equality Votes political action committee are launching a multimillion-dollar digital ad blitz aimed at reaching "equality voters" for the Harris-Walz ticket in key battleground states, the group announced Wednesday.
item.dc:creator: Juliann Ventura, NewsNation

item.title: The presidential campaigns have made over 200 visits but speak to just a fraction of American voters
item.description: The nation's unique Electoral College system for electing a president, which replaces the popular vote, puts disproportionate voting power in the hands of a relative few states.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, MPR News

item.title: The disconnect between economic data and voters' concerns
item.description: Are you worried about money? Concerned about the economy? At 9 a.m. on Thursday, MPR News host Angela Davis and her guests talk about the financial issues affecting how people plan to vote.
item.dc:creator: Angela Davis and Cari Dwyer, MPR News

item.title: Colorado Supreme Court dismisses lawsuit against Christian baker who refused to bake trans cake
item.description: The Colorado Supreme Court dismissed another lawsuit against Masterpiece Cakeshop's Jack Phillips, who faced accusations of discrimination for refusing to bake a custom cake.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Melania Trump waves off 'hand-swatting incident': A 'mere misunderstanding'
item.description: The then-first lady made headlines in 2017 when footage taken during a trip to Tel Aviv appeared to show her brushing away Trump's hand.
item.dc:creator: Judy Kurtz, NewsNation

item.title: FEMA reports it has under 10% of front-line staff available ahead of Hurricane Milton
item.description: The Federal Emergency Management Agency on Wednesday that it has less than 10% of its staff available for deployment amid preparations for the second major hurricane to hit the Southeast this month.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Trump to hold rally at New York's Madison Square Garden ahead of Election Day
item.description: Former President Trump will hold a rally this month at New York City’s Madison Square Garden, Fox News Digital has confirmed.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Trump has 9-point lead on most important issue to voters: poll
item.description: A majority of voters say the economy is the most important issue going into the presidential election, and former President Trump holds a 9-point lead over Vice President Kamala Harris on the topic.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Swing state GOP chair slams Biden-Harris admin for being out of touch on key issue: 'Abandoned this country'
item.description: Fox News Digital spoke with Arizona GOP Chairwoman Gina Swoboda about VP Harris' recent trip to the border, which Swoboda dismissed as a political "photo op.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Election board in crucial swing state sued over dispute on who will monitor election results
item.description: The Fulton County, Georgia, board filed a lawsuit against the Georgia State Election Board this week over how to best monitor the election process in the 2024 election.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Harris aims to help adult caregivers with Medicare benefit expansion
item.description: Vice President Harris on Tuesday introduced a new plan to expand Medicare benefits so that the program covers the costs of long-term home care for older Americans. The plan, formally announced on ABC’s “The View,” is aimed at helping the “sandwich generation” take care of their aging parents.
item.dc:creator: Nathaniel Weixel, NewsNation

item.title: Lombardo among GOP governors criticizing Biden-Harris immigration asylum actions
item.description: Gov. Joe Lombardo was among 25 Republican governors who signed a letter criticizing the Biden-Harris administration over asylum policies that have brought more than a half-million immigrants into the United States.
item.dc:creator: Greg Haas, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: NJ senior property tax relief bill clears hurdle
item.description: TRENTON, N.J. (PIX11) - A bill in New Jersey tied to a program designed to cut seniors' property taxes in half cleared another hurdle in Trenton. If it's implemented, StayNJ would give a property tax break of up to $6,500 to seniors 65 and older making under half a million dollars a year.
item.dc:creator: Jim Vasil, PIX 11

item.title: NY-18 candidates Pat Ryan, Alison Esposito to face off in debate
item.description: NEW YORK (PIX11) – Democratic incumbent Rep. Pat Ryan and Republican challenger Alison Esposito will make their case for why they are the best fit to lead New York Congressional District 18 during a live debate Wednesday on PIX11 News.
item.dc:creator: Lauren Cook, PIX 11

item.title: It’s a close race for Michigan. These factors could decide it for Harris or Trump
item.description: Vice President Kamala Harris needs to win back Michigan voters President Joe Biden looked poised to lose. Donald Trump’s appeal remains strong here, but he’s not without his own struggles.
item.dc:creator: Majd Al-Waheidi, MPR News

item.title: Trump urges his supporters to deliver victory in his return to scene of first assassination attempt
item.description: BUTLER, Pa. (AP) — Donald Trump returned on Saturday to the Pennsylvania fairgrounds where he was nearly assassinated in July, urging a large crowd to deliver an Election Day victory that he tied to his survival of the shooting.
item.dc:creator: JULIE CARR SMYTH, JILL COLVIN and ADRIANA GOMEZ LICON, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Can someone find out who you voted for? No. Here is what you should know
item.description: As Election Day approaches, many Americans are questioning the secrecy of their ballots. We explain what you should know about privacy and casting a ballot.
item.dc:creator: Chandelis Duster, MPR News

item.title: Obama to campaign for Harris in key swing states, starting with Pennsylvania
item.description: Former President Obama is set to hit the campaign trail for Vice President Harris this month, starting his blitz in the key battleground state of Pennsylvania next week.
item.dc:creator: Alex Gangitano, Fox 5

item.title: Hurricane Helene scrambles politics in 3 battleground states
item.description: The 500-mile-long path of destruction cut by Hurricane Helene has scrambled the politics of three battleground states that could determine control of the White House and Senate: North Carolina, Georgia and Florida.
item.dc:creator: Alexander Bolton, WFLA, NBC
